name: Rice with Garlic and Pine Nuts
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat the butter in a wide skillet over medium heat.
2. Swirl in the garlic puree.
3. Add the rice and pine nuts.
4. Saute, stirring and tossing, until the rice is heated through and has absorbed the butter.
5. Season with salt and freshly ground pepper.
6. Serve hot.
